auth.label: API Key
auth.description: TPSCheck API key sent with the Authorization Token header. Retrieve it from your profile page: https://www.tpscheck.uk/profile/.

actions.name: batch_check_phones
actions.description: Check up to 100 UK phone numbers against TPS and CTPS and return the TPSCheck v2 batch response.

items.description: One UK phone number to check with TPSCheck.

phones.description: List of 1 to 100 UK phone numbers to check with TPSCheck.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for checking up to 100 UK phone numbers with TPSCheck v2.

total.description: Number of results returned by TPSCheck.

input.description: Phone number as submitted to TPSCheck.

e164.description: E.164 formatted phone number returned by TPSCheck.

valid.description: Whether TPSCheck considers the phone number valid.

type.description: Line type returned by TPSCheck, such as landline or mobile.

original_carrier.description: Original carrier name returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

location.description: Location returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

country.description: Country or nation name returned by TPSCheck.

prefix.description: Dialling prefix returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

line.description: Line details returned by TPSCheck in the v2 phone check response.

reachability.description: Reachability details returned by TPSCheck in the v2 phone check response.

tps.description: Whether the number is registered with the TPS.

ctps.description: Whether the number is registered with the CTPS.

score.description: Compliance risk score returned by TPSCheck.

level.description: Risk level returned by TPSCheck, such as LOW or CRITICAL.

anyOf.description: One textual risk factor returned by TPSCheck.

items.description: One textual risk factor returned by TPSCheck.

anyOf.description: List of risk factors returned by TPSCheck.

factors.description: Risk factors returned by TPSCheck when risk scoring is available.

risk.description: Risk scoring block returned by TPSCheck v2 plans when available.

items.description: Normalized TPSCheck v2 result for one phone number.

results.description: Batch TPSCheck v2 results for each submitted phone number.

outputSchema.description: TPSCheck v2 batch response for multiple phone numbers.

actions.name: check_phone
actions.description: Check one UK phone number against TPS and CTPS and return the TPSCheck v2 response.

phone.description: UK phone number to check with TPSCheck.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for checking one UK phone number with TPSCheck v2.

input.description: Phone number as submitted to TPSCheck.

e164.description: E.164 formatted phone number returned by TPSCheck.

valid.description: Whether TPSCheck considers the phone number valid.

type.description: Line type returned by TPSCheck, such as landline or mobile.

original_carrier.description: Original carrier name returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

location.description: Location returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

country.description: Country or nation name returned by TPSCheck.

prefix.description: Dialling prefix returned by TPSCheck for the phone number.

line.description: Line details returned by TPSCheck in the v2 phone check response.

reachability.description: Reachability details returned by TPSCheck in the v2 phone check response.

tps.description: Whether the number is registered with the TPS.

ctps.description: Whether the number is registered with the CTPS.

score.description: Compliance risk score returned by TPSCheck.

level.description: Risk level returned by TPSCheck, such as LOW or CRITICAL.

anyOf.description: One textual risk factor returned by TPSCheck.

items.description: One textual risk factor returned by TPSCheck.

anyOf.description: List of risk factors returned by TPSCheck.

factors.description: Risk factors returned by TPSCheck when risk scoring is available.

risk.description: Risk scoring block returned by TPSCheck v2 plans when available.

outputSchema.description: Normalized TPSCheck v2 result for one phone number.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Retrieve current TPSCheck usage, remaining requests, and plan reset details.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving the current TPSCheck credits summary.

requests_used.description: Number of API requests used in the current billing period.

requests_remaining.description: Number of API requests remaining in the current billing period.

monthly_limit.description: Monthly request limit for the current TPSCheck plan.

reset_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when TPSCheck usage resets.

outputSchema.description: Current TPSCheck credits and usage summary.
